title: Collection Frontmatter
description: Schema for the YAML frontmatter in every <collections_dir>/<id>.md file. A collection is either a catalog URL (awesome list, RSS feed, link index) from which items are extracted and selectively ingested, or a manually grouped set of URLs ingested together.
x-file-example:
---
id: awesome_laravel
collection: collection
title: "Awesome Laravel"
catalog_url: https://github.com/chiraggude/awesome-laravel
catalog_type: awesome-list
description: "Curated Laravel packages and resources from the awesome-laravel list."
items:
  - https://github.com/laravel/framework
  - https://github.com/barryvdh/laravel-debugbar
sources:
  - "[[laravel_framework]]"
  - "[[laravel_debugbar]]"
concepts:
  - "[[laravel_service_container]]"
  - "[[middleware]]"
date_ingested: 2026-06-04
tags:
  - laravel
  - php
---

## Description
Curated packages and resources extracted from the awesome-laravel GitHub list.

## Sources
- [[laravel_framework]] — core Laravel framework repo
- [[laravel_debugbar]] — debug toolbar package

## Key concepts covered
- [[laravel_service_container]] — dependency injection container used across packages
- [[middleware]] — HTTP middleware layer referenced in multiple packages

## Notes

id.description: Snake_case ID used as the filename and in [[wikilinks]]

collection.description: Node type — used by Obsidian-style apps to filter nodes by collection

title.description: Human-readable title for the collection (e.g. 'Transformer Reading List')

catalog_url.description: The original catalog URL that was parsed to produce this collection (e.g. an awesome-list repo, an RSS feed, a newsletter index). Null for manually-assembled collections.

catalog_type.description: How the catalog was detected. Drives parsing strategy.

items.description: URLs selected for ingest from the catalog (or manually listed). Populated after the user confirms selection. May also include [[wikilinks]] to already-ingested source nodes.

description.description: One-sentence summary of what this collection covers and why these sources are grouped

sources.description: [[wikilink]] references to source nodes created or updated during ingest of this collection. Populated automatically after ingest.

concepts.description: Aggregated [[wikilink]] references to all concept nodes touched across all items in this collection. Populated automatically after ingest.

date_ingested.description: ISO date when this collection was first ingested (YYYY-MM-DD)
